creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you. 


(In reply to Sean Champ from comment #0)

> … the option is disabled by default, in the patched port

Maintainer feedback, please: is this advisable, as a default? 

I recall bug 254024 comment 16 from Ivan Rozhuk: 

>>> Please, why not kill gvfsd-trash?
>> 
>> Because you may have many apps that do some fs monitoring. …

– if I'm taking that (in 254024) out of context (here), sorry.
